queries.item: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_hotels` ( `hotel_id` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'Sphinx hotel ID (e.g. s1-hotel-123)', `product_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'FK to ?:products', `product_skip_reason` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Why product linking was skipped (category_failed, invalid_country, etc.)', `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `classification` TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Star rating 1-5', `property_type` VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'hotel', `destination_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `destination_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `region_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `region_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `country_code` VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL, `country_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `latitude` DECIMAL(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `longitude` DECIMAL(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `address` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Street address from API', `phone` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Hotel phone number', `email` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Hotel email address', `website` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Hotel website URL', `description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `short_description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `image_url` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `images_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'All image objects from API [{url, ...}, ...]', `product_needs_update` ENUM('Y','N') DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT 'Set to Y when API data differs from CS-Cart product', `amenities_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of amenity objects', `tags_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of tag objects', `facilities_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of facility objects from static endpoint', `boards_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of canonical board codes discovered from cache API', `is_recommended` ENUM('Y','N') DEFAULT 'N', `is_adults_only` ENUM('Y','N') DEFAULT 'N', `rating` DECIMAL(3,1) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Guest rating (e.g. 8.5)', `rating_count` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `sync_status` ENUM('active','inactive','error') DEFAULT 'active', `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, KEY `idx_product_id` (`product_id`), KEY `idx_destination` (`destination_id`), KEY `idx_region` (`region_id`), KEY `idx_country` (`country_code`), KEY `idx_classification` (`classification`), KEY `idx_sync_status` (`sync_status`), KEY `idx_sync_product` (`sync_status`, `product_id`), KEY `idx_sync_country` (`sync_status`, `country_code`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_destinations` ( `destination_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, `name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `type` VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL COMMENT 'continent, country, region, city, destination', `parent_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `country_code` VARCHAR(5) DEFAULT NULL, `full_path` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Breadcrumb: City, Region, Country, Continent', `geoname_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `latitude` DECIMAL(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `longitude` DECIMAL(10,7) DEFAULT NULL, `hotel_count` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, KEY `idx_type` (`type`), KEY `idx_parent` (`parent_id`), KEY `idx_country` (`country_code`), KEY `idx_full_path` (`full_path`(100)), KEY `idx_geoname` (`geoname_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_package_routes` ( `route_id` INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, `transport_type` VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL COMMENT 'flight, bus', `departure_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, `departure_name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `departure_iata` VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL, `arrival_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL, `arrival_name` VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, `arrival_iata` VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT NULL, `available_dates` JSON NOT NULL COMMENT 'Array of date strings', `duration` TINYINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT 'Number of nights', `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, UNIQUE KEY `uq_route` (`transport_type`, `departure_id`, `arrival_id`, `duration`), KEY `idx_departure` (`departure_id`), KEY `idx_arrival` (`arrival_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_circuits` ( `circuit_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'Sphinx API circuit ID', `name` VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `summary` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `duration_days` SMALLINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `duration_nights` SMALLINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `transport_type` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL, `destination_ids` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of destination IDs', `destination_names` VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `departure_ids` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of departure IDs', `departure_names` VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `image_url` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `itinerary_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Full itinerary from API', `tags_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL, `min_price` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL, `currency` VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR', `product_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Linked CS-Cart product ID', `sync_status` ENUM('active','inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, KEY `idx_sync_status` (`sync_status`), KEY `idx_product` (`product_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_experiences` ( `experience_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY COMMENT 'Sphinx API experience ID', `name` VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL DEFAULT '', `summary` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `description` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `duration_hours` SMALLINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `duration_days` SMALLINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `destination_ids` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of destination IDs', `destination_names` VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL, `pickup_points_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL, `image_url` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `highlights_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL, `features_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL, `tags_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL, `min_price` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL, `currency` VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR', `product_id` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Linked CS-Cart product ID', `sync_status` ENUM('active','inactive') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', `last_synced_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, KEY `idx_sync_status` (`sync_status`), KEY `idx_product` (`product_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_bookings` ( `booking_id` INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, `order_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `user_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `session_id` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL, `product_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, `hotel_id` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `hotel_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `offer_id` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Original offer ID', `room_id` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `room_type` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `board_id` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `check_in` DATE DEFAULT NULL, `check_out` DATE DEFAULT NULL, `nights` SMALLINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `adults` TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 2, `children` TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `children_ages` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `num_rooms` TINYINT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 1, `rooms_data` JSON DEFAULT NULL, `guest_name` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL, `holder_name` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `guest_email` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, `guest_phone` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL, `guests_data` JSON DEFAULT NULL, `base_price` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00, `total_price` DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT 0.00, `currency` VARCHAR(3) DEFAULT 'EUR', `status` VARCHAR(30) DEFAULT 'pending', `api_booking_ref` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Booking reference from Sphinx API', `api_response` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Full API response JSON', `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `updated_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, KEY `idx_order_id` (`order_id`), KEY `idx_user_session` (`user_id`, `session_id`), KEY `idx_hotel` (`hotel_id`), KEY `idx_status` (`status`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_sync_log` ( `log_id` INT UNSIGNED AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, `sync_type` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT 'destinations, hotels, routes, full', `status` ENUM('started','completed','failed') NOT NULL, `items_total` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `items_synced` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `items_failed` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `error_message` TEXT DEFAULT NULL, `rate_limit_hits` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0, `sync_mode` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'full' COMMENT 'full or incremental', `duration_ms` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT NULL, `started_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, `completed_at` DATETIME DEFAULT NULL, KEY `idx_type_status` (`sync_type`, `status`), KEY `idx_started` (`started_at`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD COLUMN `address` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Street address from API' AFTER `longitude`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD COLUMN `phone` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Hotel phone number' AFTER `address`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD COLUMN `email` VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Hotel email address' AFTER `phone`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD COLUMN `website` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Hotel website URL' AFTER `email`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD COLUMN `boards_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Array of canonical board codes discovered from cache API' AFTER `facilities_json`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_destinations` ADD KEY `idx_full_path` (`full_path`(100));
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_sync_log` ADD COLUMN `rate_limit_hits` INT UNSIGNED DEFAULT 0 AFTER `error_message`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_sync_log` ADD COLUMN `sync_mode` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'full' AFTER `rate_limit_hits`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD KEY `idx_sync_product` (`sync_status`, `product_id`);
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD KEY `idx_sync_country` (`sync_status`, `country_code`);
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_cache` MODIFY `cache_data` LONGTEXT NOT NULL;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD COLUMN `product_skip_reason` VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'Why product linking was skipped (category_failed, invalid_country, etc.)' AFTER `product_id`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD COLUMN `images_json` JSON DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'All image objects from API [{url, ...}, ...]' AFTER `image_url`;
ALTER TABLE `?:sphinx_hotels` ADD COLUMN `product_needs_update` ENUM('Y','N') DEFAULT 'N' COMMENT 'Set to Y when API data differs from CS-Cart product' AFTER `images_json`;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `?:sphinx_destination_whitelist` ( `id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, `destination_id` INT UNSIGNED NOT NULL COMMENT 'Reference to sphinx_destinations.destination_id', `selection_type` ENUM('all','specific') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'specific' COMMENT 'all = include all children; specific = only this destination', `created_at` DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, UNIQUE KEY `uk_destination` (`destination_id`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

language_variables.item: Sphinx REST API integration for hotel, package, circuit and experience bookings. Provides search, availability, pricing, booking and destination sync via the Sphinx travel platform.
Integrare API REST Sphinx pentru rezervări de hoteluri, pachete, circuite și experiențe. Oferă căutare, disponibilitate, prețuri, rezervări și sincronizare destinații prin platforma de turism Sphinx.
Ignore domains (comma-separated supplier IDs to skip)
Domenii ignorate (ID-uri furnizori separați prin virgulă)
Număr maxim de verificări înainte de timeout
CS-Cart category ID for Sphinx hotels
ID categorie CS-Cart pentru hoteluri Sphinx
Root category under which hotel products are created. Country sub-categories are generated automatically.
Categorie rădăcină în care se creează produsele hoteliere. Sub-categoriile pe țări se generează automat.
CS-Cart category ID for Sphinx packages
ID categorie CS-Cart pentru pachete Sphinx
Root category under which package products are created. Country sub-categories are generated automatically.
Categorie rădăcină pentru produse pachete. Sub-categoriile pe țări se generează automat.
Root category under which circuit products are created. Country sub-categories are generated automatically.
Categorie rădăcină pentru produse circuite. Sub-categoriile pe țări se generează automat.
Root category under which experience products are created. Country sub-categories are generated automatically.
Categorie rădăcină pentru produse experiențe. Sub-categoriile pe țări se generează automat.
Prag circuit breaker (eșecuri înainte de deschidere)
No sync targets configured. Configure destinations in the Whitelist to enable hotel, circuit, experience and package sync.
Nu sunt configurate ținte de sincronizare. Configurați destinațiile în Whitelist pentru a activa sincronizarea hotelurilor, circuitelor, experiențelor și pachetelor.
Prefix for CS-Cart product codes created from Sphinx hotels (e.g. SPX). The hotel ID is appended to form the full code (e.g. SPX12345).
Prefix pentru codurile de produs CS-Cart create din hoteluri Sphinx (ex. SPX). ID-ul hotelului se adaugă pentru codul complet (ex. SPX12345).
Skip hotels without description (do not create products for hotels with empty description)
Omite hoteluri fără descriere (nu crea produse pentru hoteluri fără descriere)
Inventory quantity assigned to hotel products on creation. Set high to prevent 'zero inventory' errors.
Cantitatea de inventar atribuită produselor hotel la creare. Setați o valoare mare pentru a preveni erorile de 'inventar zero'.
This will fetch all destinations from the Sphinx API. Continue?
Se vor descărca toate destinațiile din API-ul Sphinx. Continuați?
No destinations found. Run a sync first.
Nu s-au găsit destinații. Rulați mai întâi o sincronizare.
Sphinx API is not configured. Please set the API key in addon settings.
API-ul Sphinx nu este configurat. Setați cheia API în setările addon-ului.
This will fetch hotels for the selected countries from the Sphinx API. Continue?
Se vor descărca hotelurile pentru țările selectate din API-ul Sphinx. Continuați?
Hotel is present in the latest API sync and available for booking
Hotelul este prezent în ultima sincronizare API și disponibil pentru rezervări
Hotel was not found in the latest API sync — no longer available from the provider
Hotelul nu a fost găsit în ultima sincronizare API — nu mai este disponibil de la furnizor
Hotel encountered an error during sync
Hotelul a întâmpinat o eroare în timpul sincronizării
No hotels found. Run a hotel sync first.
Nu s-au găsit hoteluri. Rulați mai întâi o sincronizare hoteluri.
This will create CS-Cart products for all unlinked Sphinx hotels. Continue?
Se vor crea produse CS-Cart pentru toate hotelurile Sphinx neasociate. Continuați?
No unlinked hotels found. All hotels already have products.
Nu s-au găsit hoteluri neasociate. Toate hotelurile au deja produse.
This will reset all skipped hotels so they can be processed again. Continue?
Aceasta va reseta toate hotelurile omise pentru a fi procesate din nou. Continuați?
[count] skipped hotel(s) have been reset and are now eligible for product creation.
[count] hotel(uri) omise au fost resetate și sunt acum eligibile pentru crearea de produse.

Template for auto-creating nested CS-Cart categories during product creation. Placeholders: {country}, {region}, {city}. Example: Hotels/{country}/{region}/{city} creates Hotels > Greece > Crete > Heraklion. Category paths are cached per unique combination within each cron run to avoid redundant lookups.

Șablon pentru crearea automată a categoriilor CS-Cart la crearea produselor. Placeholder-e: {country}, {region}, {city}. Exemplu: Hotels/{country}/{region}/{city} creează Hotels > Grecia > Creta > Heraklion. Căile de categorii sunt memorate (cache) pe fiecare combinație unică.
Select which CS-Cart languages to create hotel product descriptions for. Hotels will only appear in the storefront for selected languages.
Selectați pentru care limbi CS-Cart să se creeze descrierile produselor hoteliere. Hotelurile vor apărea în magazin doar pentru limbile selectate.
Sphinx booking failed for hotel "[hotel]" in order #[order_id]. Please verify and resubmit.
Rezervarea Sphinx a eșuat pentru hotelul „[hotel]" în comanda #[order_id]. Verificați și retrimiteți.
The Sphinx offer for "[hotel]" is no longer available and has been removed from your order.
Oferta Sphinx pentru „[hotel]" nu mai este disponibilă și a fost eliminată din comanda dvs.
All hotel offers in your cart are no longer available. Please search again.
Toate ofertele de hotel din coș nu mai sunt disponibile. Vă rugăm căutați din nou.
Select countries and regions to sync. Hotels, circuits, experiences and package routes will only sync for whitelisted destinations.
Selectați țările și regiunile de sincronizat. Hotelurile, circuitele, experiențele și rutele de pachete se vor sincroniza doar pentru destinațiile din lista albă.
Lista albă de destinații a fost salvată cu succes
No destinations synced yet. Run the destinations sync first.
Nicio destinație sincronizată. Rulați mai întâi sincronizarea destinațiilor.
Are you sure you want to delete the selected hotels?
Sigur doriți să ștergeți hotelurile selectate?
